sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: TCPC INVESTOR ALERT: Bronstein, Gewirtz and Grossman, LLC Announces that BlackRock TCP Capital Corp. Stockholders with Losses Have Opportunity to Lead Class Action Lawsuit!
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has announced a class action lawsuit against BlackRock TCP Capital Corp. (NASDAQ:TCPC) and its officers. The lawsuit seeks to recover damages for investors who purchased BlackRock securities between November 6, 2024, and January 23, 2026, alleging that the company made misleading statements regarding the valuation of its investments and the effectiveness of its portfolio restructuring efforts. Investors who suffered losses have until April 6, 2026, to request to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Netcapital Inc. Announces Closing of Public Offering
feed.summary: Netcapital Inc. announced the closing of its public offering of 1,247,000 shares of common stock at $1.40 per share, generating gross proceeds of $1,745,800. The company also granted underwriters an option to purchase an additional 187,000 shares. The net proceeds are intended for general corporate purposes, working capital, and general and administrative expenses.

feed.title: Koru Medical Systems targets $47.5M–$50M revenue in 2026 as leadership transitions and international expansion accelerate
feed.summary: Koru Medical Systems is projecting revenue between $47.5 million and $50 million for 2026, driven by new leadership and an acceleration of international expansion efforts. The company is actively working to grow its market presence and financial performance in the coming years.

feed.title: Cellectis (NASDAQ:CLLS) reports full year 2025 results
feed.summary: Cellectis (NASDAQ:CLLS) announced strong financial and operational results for fiscal year 2025, highlighting significant clinical advancements in its CAR-T programs. The company reported a 100% Overall Response Rate for its lead candidate, lasme-cel, in B-ALL and an 88% ORR for eti-cel in AML. Financially, Cellectis ended the year with $211 million in cash, extending its runway into the second half of 2027.

feed.title: Why Quanta Services (PWR) Stands Out as a Leading Long-Term Investment
feed.summary: Quanta Services (PWR) has been highlighted as a leading long-term investment due to its strong performance and favorable earnings outlook. Added to the Zacks Focus List in December 2021, PWR shares have surged over 400%. The company maintains a "Hold" rating from Zacks, with analysts projecting significant earnings growth.

feed.title: Pepsi® Global Unveils Pepsi Football Nation – A New Global Platform Celebrating Football Culture Beyond the 90 Minutes
feed.summary: Pepsi Global has launched "Pepsi Football Nation," a new platform celebrating football culture beyond the pitch, connecting fans worldwide through their shared love of the sport. Built on Pepsi's 50-year heritage in football, the platform unifies partnerships and content across digital, social, retail, and live brand experiences. It aims to elevate the emotional energy of football by focusing on fan culture, rituals, and the community aspect of the game.

feed.title: BAC6342840 Bond Price and Chart — FINRA:BAC6342840
feed.summary: This article provides details on the Bank of America Corporation 4.1% 19-MAR-2029 bond (FINRA: BAC6342840), including its price chart, key terms, and issuer information. It highlights an outstanding amount, a fixed coupon of 4.1% paid monthly, and a maturity date in March 2029. The piece also offers external links to Bank of America's homepage and suggests signing up for advanced bond data.

feed.title: Investment Firm Boosts Holdings in Sterilization Provider Sotera Health - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Inherent Management Corp. has increased its stake in Sotera Health Company by acquiring an additional 200,050 shares, valued at approximately $3.31 million, in the fourth quarter. This acquisition has brought Sotera Health's representation in the investment manager's portfolio to 10.6%, making it the fifth-largest holding. Despite the company's consistent revenue growth and recent share price increase over the past year, its stock has declined since the last quarter's end due to ongoing investor concerns regarding litigation and other factors.

feed.title: Is Blackstone (BX) Now Attractive After A 30% Year To Date Share Price Decline
feed.summary: This article analyzes Blackstone (BX) after a 30% year-to-date share price decline. Using an Excess Returns analysis, Simply Wall St suggests Blackstone is undervalued by 11.7%, with an intrinsic value of US$125.05 per share. However, a Price vs. Earnings approach indicates the stock is overvalued, trading above its calculated "Fair Ratio."

feed.title: Flowserve Board Expansion Brings Duke Energy CFO Oversight To Project Risks
feed.summary: Flowserve (NYSE:FLS) has appointed Duke Energy CFO Brian Savoy to its Board of Directors and Audit Committee, also expanding the board's size. This move aims to enhance financial and risk oversight, especially considering Flowserve's involvement in energy infrastructure, clean energy projects, and recent stock performance fluctuations. Investors will be watching how this refreshed board structure influences capital allocation, audit oversight, and risk management.

feed.title: Quanta Services, Inc. Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.11 (NYSE:PWR)
feed.summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.11 per share, payable on April 10th to shareholders of record on April 2nd. This represents an annualized dividend of $0.44 and a yield of approximately 0.1%, with a payout ratio around 3.7%. The company has consistently increased its dividend for six consecutive years and analysts expect continued coverage given projected earnings.

feed.title: Lifeway Foods: Smolyansky sells $187k in shares
feed.summary: Ludmila Smolyansky, a significant owner in Lifeway Foods Inc (NASDAQ:LWAY), sold 10,000 shares for $187,399, with the stock trading near its 52-week low. Despite the recent dip and a Q4 2025 earnings miss, the company remains profitable, holds more cash than debt, and is considered undervalued by InvestingPro. Benchmark maintains a Buy rating, citing revenue growth aligning with their estimates.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands CEO Dumont sells $3.29 million in LVS stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands Chairman and CEO Patrick Dumont sold 60,165 shares of LVS common stock for approximately $3.29 million on March 17, 2026. Simultaneously, Dumont exercised options to acquire 61,740 shares at an exercise price of $52.53. These transactions occur as the company recently reported strong Q4 2025 earnings and underwent executive leadership changes with Dumont taking on multiple top roles.

feed.title: World’s largest steam locomotive heads to Philadelphia for July 4
feed.summary: Union Pacific is celebrating America's 250th anniversary with a historic East Coast tour of the Big Boy No. 4014 steam locomotive, the world's largest operating steam locomotive. The tour will culminate in Philadelphia for the Fourth of July. The company also unveiled two new commemorative locomotives: the No. 1776 – America250 and the No. 4547, which honors President Donald J. Trump, continuing a series of presidential locomotives.

feed.title: Blackstone Private Credit Fund Has First Monthly Loss Since 2022
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc.'s flagship private credit fund, BCRED, recorded its first monthly loss since September 2022, signaling potential weakening in the $1.8 trillion private credit market. The $83 billion fund saw a 0.4% decline in February, following flat performance for the first two months of 2026 after an 8% gain in 2025.

feed.title: SMX Brings A New Standard Of Authenticity And Traceability To The Global Luxury Goods Market
feed.summary: SMX (Security Matters) PLC is revolutionizing the luxury goods industry by offering advanced authentication, traceability, and material intelligence through its molecular marking technology. This innovative approach combats counterfeiting, enhances transparency, and meets consumer demands for verifiable sourcing and sustainability. By providing a permanent, invisible, and tamper-resistant identity for luxury items, SMX enables brands and consumers to confirm authenticity and provenance, transforming the trust landscape in the global luxury market.

feed.title: Hershey Trust trims 30,000 Hershey (NYSE: HSY) shares in sales
feed.summary: The Hershey Trust Company, acting as trustee for the Milton Hershey School Trust, reported the sale of 30,000 shares of The Hershey Company (HSY) common stock. These open-market transactions took place between March 18 and March 20, 2026, at prices ranging from approximately $209.64 to $211.58 per share. Following these sales, the Trust still holds over 2 million direct common shares and more than 54 million Class B common shares convertible into common stock.

feed.title: Exxon vs. Chevron: Which Energy Giant Will Pay You for Generations as Oil Prices Surge?
feed.summary: This article compares Exxon Mobil (XOM) and Chevron (CVX), two major energy giants, for income investors as oil prices surge. It analyzes their business models, financial performance, and dividend policies to determine which stock offers a more attractive long-term investment. While Exxon boasts larger scale, stronger financials, and greater dividend growth potential due to a lower payout ratio, Chevron offers a slightly higher current dividend yield.

feed.title: SMX says invisible product IDs can help luxury goods prove origin
feed.summary: SMX (Security Matters) PLC announced a new material-level authentication and traceability solution aimed at the luxury goods market. The technology uses invisible molecular markings linked to digital records, allowing brands to instantly verify product authenticity and provenance across the supply chain, including resale markets. This aims to combat counterfeiting, enhance transparency, and help brands meet sustainability and regulatory requirements for tracking product lifecycles.

feed.title: APA Corp (APA) director Bob Matthew Regis sells 23,000 shares in open-market trade
feed.summary: APA Corp director Bob Matthew Regis sold 23,000 shares of company stock in an open-market transaction on March 18, 2026. The shares were sold at a weighted average price of $36.2336 per share, with individual trades ranging from $36.21 to $36.285. Following this sale, Regis directly holds 6,634 APA Corp shares.

feed.title: Insider Sell Alert: Olivier Steimer Sells 2,000 Shares of Chubb Ltd (CB)
feed.summary: Olivier Steimer, a Director at Chubb Ltd (CB), sold 2,000 shares of the company on March 19, 2026, reducing his total holdings to 25,467.77 shares. This transaction follows a pattern of insider selling at Chubb Ltd, which has seen 2 buys and 21 sells over the past year. Despite the insider selling, Chubb Ltd is considered fairly valued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.12, trading at $329.3 per share at the time of the sale.

feed.title: Sotera Health Shares Down 24% This Year. Is the Stock a Buy as One Investor Reveals Adding $3 Million More?
feed.summary: Inherent Management Corp. recently increased its stake in Sotera Health (NASDAQ:SHC) by buying an additional 200,050 shares, valued at approximately $3.31 million. This purchase raised Sotera Health's representation to 10.62% of the fund's assets under management, signaling strong conviction despite the stock underperforming the S&P 500 and being down 24% year-to-date. The company continues to show stable fundamentals with 20 consecutive years of revenue growth, though litigation concerns and leverage weigh on its market perception.

feed.title: Internal share moves detailed by Starwood Property (NYSE: STWD) CEO
feed.summary: Starwood Property Trust CEO Barry Sternlicht reported an internal share restructuring via a Form 4 SEC filing. Entities controlled by Sternlicht distributed 661,342 common shares to employees and affiliates of the external manager. Following this, Sternlicht indirectly holds 3,110,295 shares and directly holds 14,227,455 shares, disclaiming beneficial ownership of the indirectly held securities except to his pecuniary interest.

feed.title: Blackstone's flagship private credit fund posts first monthly loss in over three years
feed.summary: Blackstone's flagship private credit fund, BCRED, recorded its first monthly loss in over three years in February, declining by 0.4%, amidst increasing investor concerns regarding liquidity strains in the private credit sector. This loss comes as private credit funds face scrutiny over weakening credit quality and a lack of transparency, leading to a surge in withdrawals from BCRED and a 28% drop in Blackstone's share value this year. Major U.S. banks are also tightening lending to the industry, and other firms like Morgan Stanley and BlackRock have limited withdrawals from their funds due to redemption requests.

feed.title: Insider Sell Alert: Lizette Herraiz Sells Shares of Strategic Ed
feed.summary: Lizette Herraiz, General Counsel at Strategic Education Inc (STRA), sold 2,982 shares on March 18, 2026, bringing her total ownership to 55,580 shares. This transaction is part of a trend for the company, which has seen 7 insider sells against 2 buys over the past year. Strategic Education Inc's stock is currently trading at $79.88, indicating it is modestly undervalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.82.

feed.title: Rezolve AI Ltd Stock Price Today | NASDAQ: RZLV Live
feed.summary: This article provides live stock data for Rezolve AI Ltd (NASDAQ: RZLV), including its current stock price, trading activity, key financial statistics, analyst ratings, and recent news. As of the article's context, RZLV's stock price is $2.56, with analysts giving it a "Strong Buy" rating and a price target of $11.25. The company specializes in AI-powered solutions for retail and e-commerce, with recent activities including a $250 million financing round and the acquisition of Reward Loyalty for $230 million.

feed.title: SoFi (SOFI) EVP sells 9,742 shares under Rule 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: SoFi Technologies executive Kelli Keough sold 9,742 shares of common stock on March 20, 2026, at a weighted average price of $16.9438 per share. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan established on July 30, 2025. After the sale, Keough directly holds 343,026 shares of SoFi Technologies common stock.

feed.title: Alignment Healthcare (ALHC) CMO sells 18,404 shares to cover taxes
feed.summary: Alignment Healthcare's Chief Medical Officer, Hyong Kim, sold 18,404 shares of common stock at a weighted-average price of $17.84 per share. This sale was explicitly stated to cover tax withholding obligations from vested restricted stock units, not a discretionary trade. Following the transaction, Kim directly holds 367,701 shares of Alignment Healthcare common stock.

feed.title: Alignment Healthcare (ALHC) president sells shares to cover RSU tax withholding
feed.summary: Alignment Healthcare, Inc. President Dawn Christine Maroney sold 36,749 shares of common stock to cover tax withholding obligations arising from vesting restricted stock units. The sale was non-discretionary and executed on the open market at a weighted-average price of $17.84 per share. Following this transaction, Maroney retains a direct holding of 1,058,813 shares in the company.

feed.title: Workday’s Duffield sells $14.25 million in shares
feed.summary: David A. Duffield, a major owner of Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY), recently sold 104,514 shares of Class A Common Stock for approximately $14.25 million, with sales occurring between $131.3491 and $134.8671 per share. This sale comes as Workday's stock has seen a 42% decline over the past six months. Despite the stock performance, the company reported solid Q4 FY2026 financial results, though several analysts have adjusted price targets due to future guidance and competitive concerns.

feed.title: Eli Lilly and Company (LLY) Announces Positive Topline Results From the Phase 3 ADorable-1 Trial
feed.summary: Eli Lilly and Company announced positive topline results from its Phase 3 ADorable-1 trial for EBGLYSS in pediatric patients with moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis, meeting primary and key secondary endpoints. The company plans to submit this data to regulators for a potential label update. Concurrently, HSBC downgraded LLY to Reduce, lowering its price target due to concerns about an overestimated total addressable market for obesity drugs and potential price competition.

feed.title: Form DEF 14A ECOLAB INC. For: 20 March
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form DEF 14A by Ecolab Inc. on March 20. It includes standard disclaimers about the high risks involved in trading financial instruments and cryptocurrencies, emphasizing that the provided data may not be real-time or accurate and is for informational purposes only. The publisher, Fusion Media, disclaims liability for any trading losses based on this information.

feed.title: Sezzle Hires PwC as New Auditor Following Internal Control Weakness - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Following a disclosure of a material weakness in internal controls related to cash flow classification for notes receivable in 2024 and 2025, buy now, pay later firm Sezzle has replaced its independent auditor Baker Tilly with PricewaterhouseCoopers. Although Baker Tilly's audit opinions for those years were unqualified, the firm deemed Sezzle's internal control over financial reporting ineffective as of late 2025 due to this weakness. The change was approved by Sezzle's audit committee, with no disagreements reported between Sezzle and Baker Tilly.

feed.title: Is Equinix (EQIX) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Its Strong Year-To-Date Rally?
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) has seen significant year-to-date and annual returns, prompting an assessment of its current valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests it is undervalued by 33.3%, while a Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio shows it as overvalued compared to industry averages and its proprietary "Fair Ratio." The article encourages investors to use personalized narratives to determine Equinix's fair value.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider TXNM Energy (TXNM) After Recent Blackstone Deal News?
feed.summary: This article analyzes TXNM Energy (TXNM) after recent Blackstone deal news, evaluating its current stock price of US$58 using Dividend Discount Model and Price-to-Earnings ratio. Both valuation methods suggest that TXNM Energy is significantly overvalued, with the DDM indicating a 72.9% premium and its P/E ratio of 41.79x being higher than the industry average. The analysis encourages investors to consider different "Narratives" for valuation and access more detailed reports for further insight.

feed.title: A Look At Bank Of America (BAC) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) has experienced recent share price volatility, with declines over 30 and 90 days, despite stronger longer-term returns. The article explores whether BAC is undervalued or overvalued, noting Simply Wall St's narrative suggests it is 8.8% overvalued with a fair value of $43.34 based on discounted cash flow, while its P/E ratio compared to peers presents another perspective. Investors are encouraged to review detailed analysis and consider future interest rate changes or regulatory impacts.

feed.title: Scholastic (SCHL) Earnings Rebound And 3.9% Margin Test Bearish Profitability Narratives
feed.summary: Scholastic (SCHL) reported strong Q3 2026 results with US$329.1 million in revenue and basic EPS of US$2.61, indicating a significant profitability rebound with a 3.9% net margin over the last 12 months. While bullish narratives point to this rebound and margin improvement, bearish views highlight a 3.8% decline in earnings per year over five years and pressure in the Education and International segments, suggesting the long-term growth story is not yet fully clear. The stock's valuation shows a P/E of 15.1x, below industry averages, but a DCF fair value of US$22.95 is significantly lower than its current trading price of US$37.28, and analysts expect earnings to decline by 21.6% annually over the next three years.

feed.title: HP’s AI-Driven Cost Savings Plan Might Change The Case For Investing In HP (HPQ)
feed.summary: HP's CFO Karen Parkhill announced an AI-driven cost savings plan targeting US$1.00 billion by fiscal 2028, aimed at addressing high memory costs and soft demand, while investing in AI PCs and secure printing. This initiative supports HP's investment narrative of transforming its mature PC and print business into an AI-enhanced platform, alongside efforts to raise prices and secure supply. While the plan is expected to reinforce the company's financial health, investors are advised to consider the ongoing pressures from declining print demand and competitive pricing which could affect margins if these savings aren't fully realized.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Peter Toth Sells 3,000 Shares of Newmont Corp (NEM)
feed.summary: Peter Toth, Executive Vice President, Chief Sustainability and Development Officer at Newmont Corp, sold 3,000 shares of the company on March 18, 2026, reducing his holding to 55,315 shares. This sale is part of a trend for Toth, who has sold 18,000 shares in the past year without any purchases, and the company as a whole has seen 24 insider sells and no buys in the same period. With shares trading at $108, Newmont Corp appears significantly overvalued based on its GF Value of $64.98, despite its price-earnings ratio being lower than the industry median.

feed.title: "It's still increasing": Dominion Energy customers show outrage as bills surge
feed.summary: Dominion Energy customers are expressing outrage over surging utility bills, with one customer, Lauren Cale, reporting her bill jumped to over $600 in February despite using less energy than the previous year. Cale has started a petition calling for an immediate, independent audit of Dominion Energy, questioning the company's spending and the high costs for consumers. A spokesperson for Dominion Energy responded by stating that energy costs vary seasonally and are influenced by weather changes, with heating systems accounting for a significant portion of energy expenses during extreme temperatures.

feed.title: Form DEF 14A ECOLAB INC. For: 20 March
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form DEF 14A by Ecolab Inc. for March 20th. It is a brief corporate update indicating a regulatory filing has been made, with minimal financial details presented directly in the text other than the company's stock performance. The article is largely surrounded by various market data, news headlines, and navigation elements.

feed.title: JPMorgan Strategists Cut S&P 500 Target on Iran War Uncertainty
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. strategists, led by Fabio Bassi, have lowered their year-end S&P 500 price target from 7,500 to 7,200 points. This cut is attributed to increased uncertainty stemming from a potential war in the Middle East and its impact on oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz. They believe such a supply shock could negatively affect corporate profits and global economic growth.

feed.title: Form 144 RED ROBIN GOURMET BURGERS INC For: 20 March
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form 144 for Red Robin Gourmet Burgers Inc. on March 20. The filing, categorized under insider trading news, provides information relevant to investors tracking company stock transactions.

feed.title: Equity grants to Rumble (RUM) general counsel include options and RSUs
feed.summary: Rumble Inc.'s general counsel, Maurice F. Edelson, was awarded equity-based compensation on March 10, 2026. This compensation includes 435,204 stock options with an exercise price of $5.23 per share and 445,803 restricted stock units (RSUs) across two grants, all vesting over several annual installments. These awards are compensation and not open-market purchases, bringing his direct holdings to 445,803 shares of Class A common stock and 435,204 stock options.

feed.title: Entity tied to Shimmick (SHIM) director sells 125K shares
feed.summary: An entity associated with Shimmick Corp director Mitchell B. Goldsteen, GOHO, LLC, sold 125,000 shares of SHIM common stock at a weighted average price of $2.86 per share. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 sales plan adopted in December 2025. Following the sale, GOHO, LLC still holds a significant 20,974,873 shares, indicating the sale represents a small portion of the indirect holdings.

feed.title: Professional Tools Industry Q4 Slowdown: Nordson, Kennametal, Middleby Results - News and Statistics
feed.summary: The professional tools and equipment industry experienced a collective slowdown in Q4, with tracked companies missing revenue estimates and seeing stock declines. Nordson reported mixed results with revenue beating estimates but organic revenue missing, leading to a stock price decrease. Kennametal outperformed with solid EBITDA estimates but also saw a modest stock decline, while Middleby had the slowest revenue growth.

feed.title: IBM Confluent Deal Aims To Anchor Real Time AI Data Strategy
feed.summary: IBM has acquired Confluent for US$11 billion to strengthen its AI and hybrid cloud strategy by integrating real-time data streaming capabilities. This acquisition aims to provide a unified platform for AI and automation, feeding continuously updated and governed data to IBM's existing AI, automation tools, and consulting projects. The deal positions IBM to be a core provider for enterprise AI data infrastructure, though risks include integrating the platform and competing with tech giants like Microsoft, Amazon, and Google.

feed.title: A Look At Take Two Interactive Software (TTWO) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Performance
feed.summary: Take-Two Interactive Software (TTWO) has shown mixed share performance recently, with a short-term decline but strong 3-year returns. Analysts and intrinsic value models suggest the stock might be undervalued against its current price of US$200.62, with a fair value estimated at $207.00. However, its P/S ratio of 5.7x is above peers, indicating potential valuation risk if growth or margins underperform, especially given the reliance on the successful execution of Grand Theft Auto VI.

feed.title: Costco Wholesale (COST) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Pullback And Long Term Return Strength
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale (COST) has experienced a recent stock price pullback despite strong long-term returns, prompting a valuation check. The article highlights that Costco is currently trading around US$972 per share, while its fair value is estimated at US$726, suggesting it is overvalued. The analysis points to high valuation multiple risk and indicates that the stock might be "priced for perfection," with an expected annualized return of only 5.6% for investors.

feed.title: SM Energy Sells Maverick Basin Assets to Bolster Financial Flexibility
feed.summary: SM Energy (NYSE: SM) is selling its Maverick Basin assets to enhance financial flexibility, reduce debt, and capitalize on rising oil prices. This strategic move, following a strong fourth-quarter performance and a merger with Civitas Resources, aims to improve liquidity while analysts raise price targets. The company plans significant capital expenditures and new production targets for the coming year, balancing growth with debt moderation amidst volatile energy markets.
